# “Sweet Dreams” Photoperiod Grow Journal
_Last updated Jan 17, 2026_
by Nebula Haze of GrowWeedEasy.com
* * *
I need your help! What should we do with all this weed? [Let us know](https://www.growweedeasy.com/website-feedback)!
* * *
[Jump to the weigh-in!](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#sweet-dreams-cannabis-weigh-in-yields) (Final Yields!) 
* * *
Five photoperiod strains in soil, the hope of sweet dreams to come, and an overarching goal: **Grow 1 pound of top-shelf weed!**
**“Sweet Dreams” Genetics** : [Blue Dream](https://seedsupreme.com/blue-dream-feminized.html#grower), [Purple Ghost Candy](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-ghost-candy-feminized-seeds-sman-pgcandy-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), [Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower), [Mandarin Cookies](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/mandarin-cookies-r1v2/ref/63951/), [GG4 x Zkittlez](https://seedsupreme.com/gg-4-x-zkittles-feminized-seeds.html#grower)
[Week 1](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#cannabis-seedling-grow-journal-1-week-old-7-day-seedlings)

[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/day-14-photoperiod-marijuana-seedlings-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)

[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cannabis-plants-just-transplanted-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
[Week 4](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#marijuana-seedling-grow-journal-week-4-growweedeasy-com)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/just-topped-plants-in-auto-watering-pot-bases-growweedeasy-cannabis-grow-journal.jpg)
[Week 5](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#marijuana-seedling-grow-journal-week-5-growweedeasy-com)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/day-35-cannabis-above-view-cuties-growweedeasy.jpg)
[Week 6](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#marijuana-seedling-grow-journal-week-6-growweedeasy-com)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/day-42-vegetative-cannabis-plants-filled-up-grow-space-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
[Week 7](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#marijuana-grow-journal-week-7-growweedeasy-com) – Initiate flowering stage (started 12/12 so buds start growing)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/day-49-flowering-day-4-growweedeasy-cannabis-grow-journal.jpg)
[Week 8](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#marijuana-grow-journal-week-8-growweedeasy-com) timelapse (flowering day 5 to 11)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/flowering-day-5-to-11-cannabis-timelapse-gif-growweedeasy.gif)
[Week 9](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#marijuana-grow-journal-week-9-now-flowering-growweedeasy-com), we’ve got buds! (flowering day 18)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/flowering-day-18-cannabis-looking-grow-tent-growweedeasy-gif-1.gif)
[Week 10](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#week-10-marijuana-grow-journal-early-flowering-growweedeasy-com) (flowering day 24) – So _stretchy!_ Smells amazing in there now.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/enjoying-the-cannabis-garden-with-a-joint-growweedeasy-sm.jpg)
[Week 11](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#week-11-marijuana-grow-journal-mid-flowering-growweedeasy-com) (flowering day 31) – Purple starting to come out in some plants.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/marijuana-flowering-day-31-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
[Week 12](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#week-12-marijuana-grow-journal-mid-flowering-growweedeasy-com) (flowering day 39) – Some of the bigger buds now held up with plant yo-yos!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/yo-yo-strings-holding-up-cannabis-blue-dream-plant-grow-tent-growweedeasy.jpg)
[Week 13](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#week-13-marijuana-grow-journal-mid-flowering-growweedeasy-com) (flowering day 44) – In natural light!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/cannabis-natural-light-flowering-day-44-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
[Week 14](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#week-14-marijuana-grow-journal-late-flowering-growweedeasy-com) (flowering day 51) – Need gloves to touch buds now (otherwise sticky fingers that reek of delicious weed smell).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/cant-touch-buds-without-gloves-now-or-regret-sticky-fingers.jpg)
[Week 15](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#week-15-marijuana-grow-journal-late-flowering-growweedeasy-com) (flowering day 59) – Sweet dreams have come
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/flowering-day-59-cannabis-plants-starting-to-fade-color.jpg)
Week 16 (flowering day 67) – First plant looking ready to harvest! ([Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower))
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/flowering-day-67-purple-ghost-candy-trichomes-bud-side-view-growweedeasy.jpg)
[Flowering day 73](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#week-17-cannabis-day-118-flowering-day-73-growweedeasy-live-grow-journal) – Harvest Day!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/cannabis-plants-drying-after-harvest-in-grow-tent-growweedeasy.jpg)
[Weigh-in](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#sweet-dreams-cannabis-weigh-in-yields) – Well over a pound of top-shelf weed!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/sweet-dreams-cannabis-harvest-in-jars.jpg)
[Jump to the latest grow journal update!](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress#sweet-dreams-cannabis-weigh-in-yields) (Weigh-in!)

**Introduction**
As we wrap up our [autoflowering grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-auto-flowering-cannabis-grow-journal), it’s time to look ahead. This time we’re going to grow with photoperiod strains, go bigger with a 4’x4′ grow tent, and turn up the PPFD with a HLG 350W Diablo LED grow light. We’re going to be trying out [AC Infinity Auto-watering pot bases](https://www.amazon.com/AC-Infinity-Self-Watering-Auto-Irrigation-Greenhouses/dp/B0B1SL84RG?crid=R1195JQXDC3J&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.zAvpHH1xLgEzDeqhtjIFWv7U1va08VGejcQ1CZqU59WJcOlk3Xv-caJfG4XGGrn7FTfBPg2rUYfzPcz3GqtwbayCPYKJc7OXSZEbqPrYd41Lr9T-jvhjliCgzIC66qxSCHCCh8HGjvSFOf0viRi7P02fS04PlGZ3PSvbjmJ_tPSVonIUQGqCUwbEQKRbdaOZ0EhUsL6aygIgban0eKM0x57tRASkvtr42-VqBu72fj4C53XAtauZUyrs1W3HGOQAgE-MNHU5nntkMaUlfGgWPUenv_Bq8GQCeWsFxDbc1tQ.P87Z06jVknQ5bG4eg23aorzC5_ygiKhZ_RloSogS34Q&dib_tag=se&keywords=auto%2Bwatering%2Bpots&qid=1753477618&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=auto%2Bwatering%2Bpot%2Clawngarden%2C145&sr=1-1-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=3497ec099c49b9d0dd2525b2015ec996&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl), using [Coco Loco](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00HP30LWW?amp=&crid=1DU1UDS1I10FJ&sprefix=coco%2B&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=8b1e571d2de3114572ba9af0f0a6e596&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) soil and [FoxFarm nutrients](https://www.amazon.com/Fox-Farm-Liquid-Nutrient-Formula/dp/B0155IDYX6?th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=872d5e1b3e30899d5e3d7a11a6cec2b9&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl).
Want to join us? [Sign up for our newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news) to follow along live, week by week, as we turn a handful of cannabis seeds into a bountiful harvest. Over the coming weeks, you’ll see every part of the grow journey.

  * [5-gallon Fabric Pots](https://www.amazon.com/JNYONG-12-Pack-Thickened-Non-Woven-Aeration/dp/B091YCHXD7?crid=1OFPFD4YSH156&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.9dHCRVnhf3tk_VbRLweSvabUFP58Pj9OpxYW1TyL50P_-QwMGjbbIUcMAynRx6KxWAAs1igKFj8P33oRAXy4MIIGWWcQ5SXXqt-juUa60Gu5pJPjKEqzR2pbWwvAAllG7zx9vdxbZzKpKWLRhmhOPR7IvFzzzkhj63GGr-SsdV92R7jlISNn8D6q83NYTZN1PKeP-lCwBvzneNeDTdUpiVQi2gkRlIaH-XLYVw56-eNeXYYncK218foMIyScR3FjBdwMR56aLagQp1UnCAiHJxdbFVLWAOWf6zNh4uReTYc.5a3nWGhO8NyWU_I2v4vXNgUYzKBvBeeaHyXVJ45k6UI&dib_tag=se&keywords=5-gallon%2Bfabric%2Bpots&qid=1753477568&sprefix=5-gallon%2Bfabri%2Caps%2C192&sr=8-1-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=f2f31b4e4ecae67f783de5414183f9a1&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)

  * [AC Infinity Auto-watering pot bases](https://www.amazon.com/AC-Infinity-Self-Watering-Auto-Irrigation-Greenhouses/dp/B0B1SL84RG?crid=R1195JQXDC3J&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.zAvpHH1xLgEzDeqhtjIFWv7U1va08VGejcQ1CZqU59WJcOlk3Xv-caJfG4XGGrn7FTfBPg2rUYfzPcz3GqtwbayCPYKJc7OXSZEbqPrYd41Lr9T-jvhjliCgzIC66qxSCHCCh8HGjvSFOf0viRi7P02fS04PlGZ3PSvbjmJ_tPSVonIUQGqCUwbEQKRbdaOZ0EhUsL6aygIgban0eKM0x57tRASkvtr42-VqBu72fj4C53XAtauZUyrs1W3HGOQAgE-MNHU5nntkMaUlfGgWPUenv_Bq8GQCeWsFxDbc1tQ.P87Z06jVknQ5bG4eg23aorzC5_ygiKhZ_RloSogS34Q&dib_tag=se&keywords=auto%2Bwatering%2Bpots&qid=1753477618&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=auto%2Bwatering%2Bpot%2Clawngarden%2C145&sr=1-1-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=3497ec099c49b9d0dd2525b2015ec996&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)

**Nutrients:**[FoxFarm Nutrient Trio](https://www.amazon.com/Fox-Farm-Liquid-Nutrient-Formula/dp/B0155IDYX6?th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=872d5e1b3e30899d5e3d7a11a6cec2b9&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (Big Bloom, Grow Big, Tiger Bloom)
  * Using [this nutrient schedule](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/fox-farms-soil-cannabis-chart.pdf) (I make notes in the journal for any deviations)

**Strains (“Sweet Dreams” themed!)**
  * [Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower)
  * [Purple Ghost Candy](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-ghost-candy-feminized-seeds-sman-pgcandy-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
  * [Mandarin Cookies V2](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/mandarin-cookies-r1v2/ref/63951/)
  * [Blue Dream](https://seedsupreme.com/blue-dream-feminized.html#grower)
  * [GG4 x Zkittlez](https://seedsupreme.com/gg-4-x-zkittles-feminized-seeds.html#grower)

**Quick Summary:** 4’x4′ grow tent with HLG Diablo 350 LED, 5-gallon fabric pots full of Bush Doctor Coco Loco soil, FoxFarm nutrients.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/sweet-dreams-4x4-grow-tent-hlg-350-led-marijuana-setup-growweedeasy.jpg)
We are trying [AC Infinity auto-watering pot bases](https://www.amazon.com/AC-Infinity-Self-Watering-Auto-Irrigation-Greenhouses/dp/B0B1SL84RG?crid=R1195JQXDC3J&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.zAvpHH1xLgEzDeqhtjIFWv7U1va08VGejcQ1CZqU59WJcOlk3Xv-caJfG4XGGrn7FTfBPg2rUYfzPcz3GqtwbayCPYKJc7OXSZEbqPrYd41Lr9T-jvhjliCgzIC66qxSCHCCh8HGjvSFOf0viRi7P02fS04PlGZ3PSvbjmJ_tPSVonIUQGqCUwbEQKRbdaOZ0EhUsL6aygIgban0eKM0x57tRASkvtr42-VqBu72fj4C53XAtauZUyrs1W3HGOQAgE-MNHU5nntkMaUlfGgWPUenv_Bq8GQCeWsFxDbc1tQ.P87Z06jVknQ5bG4eg23aorzC5_ygiKhZ_RloSogS34Q&dib_tag=se&keywords=auto%2Bwatering%2Bpots&qid=1753477618&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=auto%2Bwatering%2Bpot%2Clawngarden%2C145&sr=1-1-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=3497ec099c49b9d0dd2525b2015ec996&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) for the first time (aka “auto-pots”)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/auto-watering-pot-bases-growing-cannabis-grow-journal-growweedeasy-com.jpg)
[FoxFarm Nutrient Trio for soil](https://www.amazon.com/Fox-Farm-Liquid-Nutrient-Formula/dp/B0155IDYX6?th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=872d5e1b3e30899d5e3d7a11a6cec2b9&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) following [this schedule](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/fox-farms-soil-cannabis-chart.pdf) in [Coco Loco soil](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00HP30LWW?amp=&crid=1DU1UDS1I10FJ&sprefix=coco%2B&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=8b1e571d2de3114572ba9af0f0a6e596&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/fox-farm-coco-loco-soil-nutrients-sweet-dreams-grow-journal-growweedeasy.jpg)
##  Nebula Haze’s Sweet Dreams Photoperiod Grow Journal
Here is the first entry, which we sent to the GrowWeedEasy.com growing community via our Sunday email newsletter.
## August 3, 2025 – New Photoperiod Grow Journal: T-minus 1 week!
I am about sprout seeds for our next grow (photoperiod strains this time), and then we’re off to the races on a new grow journal!
**Yield Goal:** 1 lb (16 oz) of top-shelf weed!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/different-strains-sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow.jpg)
**We’d love for you to join us with your own photoperiod grow!** Think of it as a grow challenge we can all go through together. If you’re a little ahead (already sprouted) or behind (can’t germinate yet this week), that’s okay! We can still be together in spirit 🙂
**HIT REPLY if you’re joining us, and let us know your setup and strains**. We’d love to hear what you’re up to, and we may feature you in a future newsletter!
~Nebula Haze  
GrowWeedEasy.com
##  Germination Time – Seeds have sprouted!
I chose to use the [Paper Towel method](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-germinate-seeds-via-paper-towel-method) to germinate my cannabis seeds this time. When combined with a little heat, I’ve had the best germination rates and fastest germination with this method. And it makes it easier to track the progress of each seed. However, other simpler methods like [planting the seeds directly in soil](https://www.growweedeasy.com/easiest-way-to-germinate-cannabis-seeds-plant-seeds-in-soil) work too!
First I pick the seeds I want to grow, and cut a paper towel to the size of the plate.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/sweet-dreams-grow-about-to-sprout-seeds-paper-towel-method-sm.jpg)
**Note: Use the CHEAPEST paper towels** you can find. The nice “cloth-like” ones are no good because roots can grow into them. But super cheap paper towels work perfect.
I decided to germinate 3 seeds per strain, just to ensure I get to grow all 5 of the strains, and pick one extra for a total of 6 plants.
All the “extra” seedlings are going to get grown in the [mini tent](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial)! We’ll do a little [“Sea of Green” grow](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sea-of-green) with the [100W Spider Farmer LED](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-Dimmable-MeanWell-Spectrum/dp/B07TS82HWB?crid=1PSGJ4SPLIG8B&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.UUWW6dbK2oScDyzgnDNqhhrt0pPm1-4cUQ8UKMtPOKyrKGh1kN94rIH2EVjaQA7VVydMEf0GQ9tPpei0cnkjaiPSXvE9tW9S2AfI9T5b-whYVboIKNvlL7BxMCW-t3LhxE-6qmrfKN6rEFwXvhPLBrTlLsleogJbZMvEQ41SsnpCfwuBqX0Bcre2f3Adg1PKMuIY4b9FEX0hcpi5gdNw2JIG-hWaSIDpQ1-FEdJwej4QncK6PtXK9FLPwZIYdX51m9pevsxYxHRjLxcdjn63AonK-LX6viiZF-DepnFCoIs.nJI3Ew0HX97mjGesA9bB6ScxzoUAoeWDfOHq-ipxo5w&dib_tag=se&keywords=100w%2Bspider%2Bfarmer&qid=1754794496&sprefix=100w%2Bspider%2Bfarmer%2Caps%2C146&sr=8-1&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=1133e1dd84d0c4bf7aff09c1a945dc5e&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl). It will be fun to see how the buds from the mini tent compare to the buds in this more powerful HLG Diablo LED grow tent.
[Purple Ghost Candy](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-ghost-candy-feminized-seeds-sman-pgcandy-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) seeds – I am super excited about this strain. In [past grows](https://www.growweedeasy.com/home-grow-strain-review-purple-ghost-candy-by-seedsman), it has produced some of the favorite weed we’ve ever grown.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/seedsman-purple-ghost-candy-seeds-in-breeder-pack-sweet-dreams-growweedeasy.jpg)
[Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) – I like how safe the seeds seem like inside the box. I have heard _so_ much good stuff about this strain and I can’t wait to see what all the fuss is about for myself!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/candy-games-38-photoperiod-seeds-growweedeasy-sweet-dreams-grow.jpg)
[Mandarin Cookies V2](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/mandarin-cookies-r1v2/ref/63951/) – These are actually old seeds, from all the way back in 2020. There are only a few seeds left out of a pack of 10. Every single plant I’ve grown from this pack has been a bit different from each other, but every single one has produced fire weed.
The breeder recently released an [R3 version](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/new-mandarin-cookies-r3-f/ref/63951/) of this strain which claims to take the best traits of Mandarin Cookies and make a super stabilized version aimed at home growers who seek consistency. I decided it was time to grow the last of the original cross, and then next time I can compare these three plants to the new R3 version.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/mandarin-cookies-v3-cannabis-seeds-sweet-dreams-grow-journal-growweedeasy-nebula-haze.jpg)
[Blue Dream](https://seedsupreme.com/blue-dream-feminized.html#grower) and [GG4 x Zkittlez](https://seedsupreme.com/gg-4-x-zkittles-feminized-seeds.html#grower) (both by Seed Supreme) – The Blue Dream strain is legendary, no explanation needed for why I picked it for a Sweet Dreams grow! “GG4 x Zkittlez” just sounded like a fun sweet strain to round off the grow. Every GG4 (Gorilla Glue #4) and every Zkittlez I’ve grown have turned out well. So why not see how they play together as a mix?
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/seed-supreme-seeds-blue-dream-gg4-zkittlez-growweedeasy-sweet-dreams-grow.jpg)
Make sure to add labels before closing up your seeds. I used a marker. Otherwise, it’s easy to forget which seed is which!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/label-paper-towels-to-know-which-cannabis-seed-is-which-during-germination.jpg)
I add just one single paper towel on top, so that it’s easy to see whether the seeds underneath have sprouted yet. Then I add just enough water that everything is thoroughly wet, but there isn’t liquid water sloshing around.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/put-one-single-paper-towel-on-top-and-add-water-germination-cannabis-seeds.jpg)
Close her up! Just add another plate on top to lock in the moisture and make sure seeds get darkness while germinating. Make sure the paper towels are all fully enclosed inside the plates.
[Tutorial: Wet paper towel cannabis seed germination method](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-germinate-seeds-via-paper-towel-method)
I find germination happens faster, and I get higher overall germination rates, if I add a little heat. However, a regular seedling heating mat can get _too_ hot. So I put a little something between the plate and the seedling heating mat. In this case, the tray of Rapid Rooters I’m going to use for the seedlings.
This makes it so that the plate is getting some warmth, but the seeds never sit on hot spots.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/wet-paper-towel-method-cannabis-seeds-heating-pad.jpg)
[Learn more about heating mats for seed germination](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-improve-cannabis-seed-germination-rate-reptile-heat-mat).
I left the seeds on the kitchen counter for 3 days…
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/germinating-cannabis-seeds-on-the-kitchen-counter-with-seedling-heating-pad-sm.jpg)
When I checked on them, it appeared that every seed had cracked! I could see under the single wet sheet of paper towel.
Click for closeup! You can see the seeds have sprouted underneath.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cannabis-seeds-sprouted-under-wet-paper-towels-growweedeasy-sm.jpg)
**I ALMOST had the perfect unveiling video** , but one Candy Games #38 seeds ruined it right at the end haha
Several of them have totally escaped their seed shells, and are just naked seedlings on the paper towel.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/which-seeds-sprouted-the-best-growweedeasy.jpg)
Which cannabis seeds sprouted best?
  * **1st Place:** [Blue Dream](https://seedsupreme.com/blue-dream-feminized.html#grower) and [Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) – All seeds sprouted, big long roots, already escaped their shells by the time I unveiled them from under the paper towel. In my experience, these types of seeds, where the entire seedling comes all the way out of the shell in the paper towel, often grow the most vigorously.
  * **2nd Place:** [Mandarin Cookies](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/mandarin-cookies-r1v2/ref/63951/) and [Purple Ghost Candy](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-ghost-candy-feminized-seeds-sman-pgcandy-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – Not as uniformly vigorous as the others. Purple Ghost Candy had one seed with a strangely thin root. And although all 3 Mandarin Cookies seeds sprouted, they had overall smaller roots than the other seeds. But hey, they’re 5 years old, which is ancient in seed years. I won’t hold it against them for taking it a little slower 🙂
  * **3rd Place:** [GG4 x Zkittlez](https://seedsupreme.com/gg-4-x-zkittles-feminized-seeds.html#grower) – Although all 3 seeds sprouted, one just cracked open and the root hasn’t come out yet. Not a good sign when every single other seed has an actual root. Maybe it will pull through, but in my experience seeds like that rarely thrive. I will put it in a Rapid Rooter and hope for the best. But luckily, the other two seedlings look great!

Rapid Rooters are seedling-friendly “plugs”.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/rapid-rooters-in-seedling-tray-cannabis-germination-growweedeasy-home-grow-journal.jpg)
I cut the Rapid Rooters so that it’s easy to add sprouted seeds.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cut-rapid-rooters-to-make-it-easy-to-add-germinated-seeds-growweedeasy-tutorial-1.jpg)
And here’s what it’s like to put a seed inside!
When they’re cut open, the seedlings fit perfectly inside even if they’ve got a curly tail, like the one in the above example.
Here they are after being put into Rapid Rooters. I positioned the ones with leaves right at the top so they could immediately start getting light. The ones still inside the shells got placed just below the surface, so they hopefully push the shell off as they emerge.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/seedlings-in-rapid-rooters-on-seedling-heat-mat.jpg)
Hopefully everyone pokes their head out soon 🤞 Here’s to hoping that I wake up tomorrow to a ton of happy little green leaves!
Stay tuned for the next update!
Happy growing!  
_Nebula Haze_  
GrowWeedEasy.com
* * *
##  Week 1 – Seedlings put into cups!
Here is everything that happened in our cannabis seedlings’ first week of life.
**Day 1** – Seedlings emerge…
The next morning, I’m greeted by many seedlings saying hi!
Day 1 seedlings
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/day-1-cannabis-seedlings-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
Not every seed has made it above the Rapid Rooters, but 13 of the 15 sprouted have little leaves opened up.
Two seedlings haven’t appeared yet.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/day-1-seedlings-put-in-rapid-rooters-yesterday-two-havent-appeared-yet-growweedeasy-1.jpg)
**Day 2** – Seedlings are loving life!
By day 2, all the seedlings have appeared but one. Looking at that empty Rapid Rooter, I don’t any signs of life.
I decided to open it up and can see the root never emerged further than it did in the paper towels. After two days of no growth, it’s safe to say it didn’t make it. So I tossed that one.
All seedlings have their heads above ground now!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/day-2-cannabis-seedlings-all-appeared-growweedeasy.jpg)
**The Story of the Doomed One-Leaf Seedling**
While I’m here, I want to share this story of what happened with one of the seedlings. I doomed this seedling by accident. It wasn’t because I didn’t care. In fact, this was a Purple Ghost Candy seed, the strain I wanted to grow the MOST. That made it feel extra tragic.
So here are the seedlings right after they germinated. And here is as close a picture of the Purple Ghost Candy sprouted seed I got at the time.
**This pic is from germination day.** Just before I committed the horrible crime against the Purple Ghost Candy seedling.
Sorry for the picture quality, I didn’t know I was filming its last moments.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/doomed-purple-ghost-candy-sprouted-seed-before-the-leaf-was-ripped-off.jpg)
I noticed the shell was stuck to one of the little round leaves, which is normally fine. It’s okay if one leaf has a little shell stuck to it. It will fall off on its own.
**But then it happened…**
**One leaf was ripped off!** I was trying to take pictures with one hand and put seedlings into Rapid Rooters with the other hand. I wasn’t being careful at all. And when I moved it, I was not gentle, and accidently ripped off the leaf attached to the shell!
I knew something was wrong when it happened, but I was hoping, just _hoping_ , that the middle growing tips had survived, and it was just the little round leaf that got pulled off.
But by the time it made it’s head above soil, I could tell it was almost certainly doomed.
**The leaf that got ripped off was stuck to the shell!**
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cannabis-seedling-shell-ripped-off-a-leaf-growweedeasy-sm.jpg)
By 4 days later, the writing was on the wall. Nothing was growing from this seedling.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/purple-ghost-candy-cannabis-seedling-leaf-ripped-off-one-leaf.jpg)
I actually still have that one-leaf Purple Ghost Candy seedling. You will see it in future pictures. I’m going to let it live. How cool would it be if it miraculously started growing?
**Analysis:** This one-leaf seedling was my fault. I ripped off the leaf. The Purple Ghost Candy seedling was perfectly fine when it germinated. If I had been more careful when transferring the seedling to a Rapid Rooter, this wouldn’t have happened.
That being said, a shell shouldn’t get stuck on a leaf like that. But cannabis plants are living things and they don’t always grow perfectly.
Luckily, I only need one Purple Ghost Candy seedling and I still have two to choose from even without this one.
**Day 4** – Time to put in cups!
I could put them in their final pots. But I haven’t decided which 5 lucky seedlings to keep yet. So I’m going to put them all in cups so they get a few more days and I can try to pick the 5 best, most matching seedlings.
In retrospect, I _probably_ should have given them another day or two in the Rapid Rooters, so their roots had fully colonized the plugs before moving them. But luckily, it ends up being just fine 🙂 Cannabis plants really do grow like a weed!
Transplant time! They’ll get very light nutrients today (seedling strength).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/day-4-cannabis-seedlings-fox-farm-nutrients-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
I cut drainage holes in the bottom of the cups for the marijuana seedlings.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cut-drainage-holes-cups-for-marijuana-seedlings-growweedeasy.jpg)
Filled the cups with soil and made labels.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/about-to-move-cannabis-seedlings-to-cups-full-of-soil.jpg)
I poked Rapid Rooter sized holes in the soil, and just plopped the seedlings in. Gave about 40 ml of clean water, and left them alone.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/made-a-hole-in-the-soil-about-the-size-of-the-seedling-plug-growing-cannabis-seedlings-growweederasy.jpg)
I used tweezers to easily grab the plugs to move them.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/used-tweezers-to-grab-the-rapid-rooters-cannabis-seedlings-growweedeasy-com-gif.gif)
Plopped in the Rapid Rooter
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/gg4xzkittlez-cannabis-seedling-just-put-in-cups-growweedeasy-seedling-grow-journal-Copy.jpg)
Slowly gave 40 mL of water (it would have been easier if I’d used a [syringe](https://www.amazon.com/Scientific-Measurement-Refilling-Applicator-Individually/dp/B0DQGZJ566?content-id=amzn1.sym.00411cf2-fa35-488c-872d-c1a08e31e7e6%3Aamzn1.sym.00411cf2-fa35-488c-872d-c1a08e31e7e6&crid=1BUXBQGZSYJQ0&cv_ct_cx=syringe&keywords=syringe&pd_rd_i=B0DQGZJ566&pd_rd_r=cdf74217-a983-435f-b3b5-626c1ed4ea57&pd_rd_w=B5EwM&pd_rd_wg=d0Hs9&pf_rd_p=00411cf2-fa35-488c-872d-c1a08e31e7e6&pf_rd_r=AHKWXXS10BB4C7VGSN0S&qid=1755371005&sbo=RZvfv%2F%2FHxDF%2BO5021pAnSA%3D%3D&sprefix=syring%2Caps%2C215&sr=1-1-0ba1f650-a452-496e-9308-d2a1b7777f15-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9zZWFyY2hfdGhlbWF0aWM&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=117edcde6a4a9dcc8796d1c1cc4cd132&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl), which I have tons of, but I didn’t think of that until after haha)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/give-cannabis-seedling-water-after-trasnplating-to-cups-growweedeasy-com.jpg)
**Story of The Mutant Seedling**
That was the first GG4 x Zkittlez seedling. But while we’re here, I wanted to share the other GG4 x Zkittlez seedling, which is a MUTANT!
Here’s a baby picture of our little “clover” 🍀 mutant, not long after it sprouted.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/baby-picture-mutant-cannabis-seedling.jpg)
I thought to myself, “That looks a bit odd.” But I thought it was a “tri-fold” seedling, which is when a seedling grows 3 leaves per node. That’s pretty common. But that’s not what this was.
**Here it is on day 4.** Same strain as the normal seedling below, but now it’s clear that _this_ seedling has an odd mutation 🍀
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/mutant-clover-3-leaf-trifold-muation-cannabis-seedling-growweedeasy.jpg)
Let me show you the difference.
Here is a normal cannabis seedling
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/normal-gg4xzkittlez-cannabis-seedling-growweedeasy.jpg)
**Normal seedling**
  * **Two leaves per “node”** – If you look closely at the normal seedling. You can see that each new “layer” (also known as a “node”) is a set of two leaves. A pair of leaves per node.
  * **Normal sequence for seedlings**
    * **2 round leaves** – The first two round leaves are called “cotyledons” and were already fully formed inside the shells.
    * **2 serrated leaves** – The second set of leaves (with serrated edges) was grown completely by the plant.
    * **Another 2 serrated leaves** – Next you see another set of two leaves growing in.
    * **And so on** for many sets of nodes…

On a normal seedling, this “pair of leaves per node” continues on for at least the first 6-7 sets of leaves, and often for several weeks longer. Older plants, don’t grow this way (which is why “clones” don’t grow like normal seedlings, but that’s neither here nor there).
Typically when you see unusual growth patterns on growing seedlings, it’s a [sign there was a mutation](https://www.growweedeasy.com/7-common-cannabis-plant-mutations). Often called “mutant” seedlings.
**Our adorable little mutant “clover”****is growing to the beat of its own drum.**
I’m not sure exactly what it’s doing yet. It appears mostly healthy and green, but all leaves are growing directly from the middle, like an actual clover. Let me know if you want to see more pics of it as it grows!
**What happens next with a mutant seedling?**
In my experience, with mutant seedlings, they go one of two ways. They either _always_ grow weird, or they sort of “grow out of it” and start growing normally. We’ll let this one grow to see what happens!
Now back to the main show….
Voila! Everyone is finally in the grow tent!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cannabis-seedlings-just-put-in-grow-tent-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
Environment Notes
  * **LED to top of tent, dimmed to 1/2 power** – I put the LED grow light all the way to the top of the tent, and turned down to half power. The [HLG 350W Diablo](https://www.amazon.com/Horticulture-Lighting-Group-Quantum-Certified/dp/B08KYNTRWN?&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=8555a8812925894ddcc306589a629565&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) is _extremely_ powerful LED grow light. It’s amazing for flowering plants, but you have to be very careful with seedlings and young plants, as it will overwhelm them.
  * **Temperature about 77°F / 25°C with lights on** – I’d like it just a bit warmer for the seedlings. Seedlings love it closer to 80-85°F / 27-29°C under LEDs. LEDs don’t warm up the inside of leaves like the sun (or a bulb light like T5, MH, HPS, CMH, or LEC). What does that mean? Under LEDs, the leaves are about the same temperature as the air. In other words, it always “feels” a little colder for seedlings under an LED compared to the same air temperature under the sun. I’ll close up this room to help keep more heat in, and once I turn the LED up to full power, it will add plenty of heat and this won’t be a consideration anymore!
  * **Nutrients** – Following the FoxFarm trio nutrient schedule at “seedling strength”. No supplements. Just water and a light dose of nutrients.

Seedlings will go into their pots once the leaves reach the edges of the cups and all look healthy and happy. I’ve noticed f you keep seedlings in cups, it helps them all stay the same size. With photoperiods, that helps keep everyone “together” in a cohort.
_Side note:_ In side-by-side tests with some seedlings in cups, and some in big pots, I’ve found they grow at the same rate for the first 2 weeks or so. But after that, cups tend to slow down seedling growth. That means leaving them all in cups can help any seedlings that are behind the others get some time to catch up. You wouldn’t want to do that with an autoflowering strain grow, where it’s a race to the finish line and you don’t want to slow down growth for a second at the beginning, but with photoperiod plants you can take your time since plants don’t start making buds until you tell them to.
Once they’ve all got a few sets of leaves, I will pick the **5 “Sweet Dreams” Champions** , one plant of each strain, and move them to their final homes.
**Day 7 seedlings** – Looking happy!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/14-cannabis-seedlings-but-two-are-unusual-sm.jpg)
**One-leaf mutant** – [Here’s a closeup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/one-leaf-seedling-day-7-cannabis-seedling-mistake.jpg) of the one-leaf-seedling at 7 days old, for those interested in its journey. Is that middle bit getting longer? To me, it looks like the little “flap” got slightly longer but is not making any significant progress. What do you think?
Day 7 top view
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cannabis-seedlings-day-7-top-view-growweedeasy-grow-journal.jpg)
Seedlings on left – Click for closeups!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cannabis-seedlings-day-7-top-view-growweedeasy-grow-journal-set-1.jpg)
Seedlings on right – Click for closeups!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cannabis-seedlings-day-7-top-view-growweedeasy-grow-journal-set-2.jpg)
Check back next Sunday for the next update! Or sign up below to get our home grow newsletter with get live grow journal updates delivered to you every Sunday morning at 4:20am.
Happy growing!  
_Nebula Haze_
